name: Cairo & Giza Pyramids Tour
description: Explore the iconic pyramids of Giza, visit the Great Sphinx, and discover ancient Egyptian treasures in the Egyptian Museum.

name: Luxor & Valley of the Kings
description: Journey through ancient Thebes exploring Karnak Temple, Luxor Temple, and the mystical Valley of the Kings.

name: Aswan & Abu Simbel Cruise
description: Sail along the Nile River discovering colossal temples and experiencing authentic Egyptian culture in Aswan and Abu Simbel.

name: Red Sea Beach & Diving
description: Relax at pristine Red Sea beaches with world-class diving opportunities among vibrant coral reefs and exotic marine life.

name: Alexandria Mediterranean City
description: Discover the pearl of the Mediterranean with its ancient libraries, stunning coastal views, and rich historical monuments.

name: Sinai Desert & Mount Moses
description: Experience the majestic Sinai desert, climb Mount Moses at sunrise, and visit Saint Catherine's Monastery.

name: Nile Delta & Ismailiyah Tour
description: Explore the Suez Canal region, visit Ismailiyah, and experience the lush greenery of the Nile Delta.

name: Islamic Cairo Heritage Tour
description: Walk through historic Islamic Cairo exploring magnificent mosques, madrasas, and bustling Khan el-Khalili bazaar.

name: Fayoum Oasis Adventure
description: Discover the enchanting Fayoum Oasis with its crystal-clear lakes, waterfalls, and unique desert landscape.
